title: Dekton Knife Sharpener With Suction Cup Base-Tungsten Steel For Coarse Sharpening| Sharpens Straight-edged Knives Scissors| Steel Blades| Adjustable Angle For Precision| Non-slip Suction Base Stable
features: Tungsten Steel for Coarse Sharpening: The Dekton Knife Sharpener is equipped with tungsten steel sharpening blades that provide powerful coarse sharpening for dull and damaged knives. This robust material is engineered to restore the cutting edge of your straight-edged knives, making them as sharp as new with minimal effort.

Sharpens Straight-Edged Knives and Scissors: Designed for versatility, this knife sharpener efficiently sharpens not only straight-edged knives but also scissors. The specialized slots ensure that both tools are honed to perfection, allowing you to maintain a razor-sharp edge on all your essential cutting tools.

Precision Steel Blades: The precision-engineered steel blades of the Dekton Knife Sharpener are crafted to deliver accurate and consistent sharpening results every time. These high-quality blades ensure that your knives and scissors are sharpened evenly, reducing the risk of uneven edges that can impair performance.

Adjustable Angle for Precision Sharpening: Achieve the perfect edge every time with the adjustable angle feature of this sharpener. Whether you need a fine edge for slicing or a sturdy one for chopping, you can customize the sharpening angle to suit your specific needs

Non-Slip Suction Base for Stability: Safety and stability are paramount with the Dekton Knife Sharpener, thanks to its non-slip suction cup base. This feature secures the sharpener firmly to any smooth surface, preventing slipping or movement during use. The stable base allows you to focus on sharpening without worrying about accidents.
